raw_comment:
1.What do you notice?
I notice there is far less head coaches of color than there is players of color.This pattern is constant throughout the graphs.

2.What do you wonder?
I wonder why the number of head coaches of color  is so low compared to players of color?

3.What impact does this have on you and your community?
With all the diversity in my very own community I see many people of color participating in sports however it may be difficult for them to relate or connect with their own coaches.

4. What's going on in this graph?Write a catchy headline that would capture the graph's main idea.
A catchy headline that would capture the graph's main idea could be " The difference between head coaches and players of color among  different sport leagues"
ace_sentences: I notice that there are far fewer head coaches of color than players of color.
This pattern is constant throughout the graphs.
I wonder why the number of head coaches of color is so low compared to players of color.
I see many people of color participating in sports in my community.
It may be difficult for people of color to relate to their own coaches.
It may be difficult for people of color to connect with their own coaches.
The difference between head coaches and players of color among different sport leagues.
